pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates task with priority 'Medium' initially (line 53). Task description states 'Change Priority to High' (line 5 of task.json). Verifier checks for 'high' or 'critical' (verifier.py line 52). The target value 'High' is correct.

setup_task.sh creates task assigned to 'generic-user' (line 57). Task description states 'Reassign the task to yourself (arkcase-admin)' (line 5 of task.json). Verifier checks for 'arkcase-admin' in assignee (verifier.py line 67). The target value 'arkcase-admin' is correct.

setup_task.sh hardcodes TASK_TITLE='Initial Legal Review' (line 44) and creates task with this title (line 51). Task description and metadata both reference this exact title. Verifier uses this title for fallback task search (export_result.sh line 30).

privileged_info_summary: The escalate_overdue_task requires modification of a task titled 'Initial Legal Review' from an initial state (priority: Medium, assignee: generic-user) to target state (priority: High, assignee: arkcase-admin, due date: tomorrow). All three metadata claims are verified: task_title is 'Initial Legal Review', target_priority is 'High', and target_assignee is 'arkcase-admin'. The task data is synthetic, generated at runtime by the setup script via ArkCase API calls.
